text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, <chrname> and the other
students have gone on a field trip to observe a
race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The academy is void of students and completely
silent... or so I thought... I hear faint groaning
sounds from nearby.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Urghhh... Gurrrggh! Where have my precious
Umas gone?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right... I'm Agnes Zombie Digital, and I'm
starving for Umas!
choice_data_list:
I thought all the students went to watch the
race...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Poor wittle me! I've been out sick with a cold for
the past few days...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I forcibly expelled that plague from my
system because I was craving a sweet, sweet
glimpse of some glorious Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But what's this?! There's not even a WHIFF of an
Uma around! I can't believe I forgot there was a
field trip today! Curses! What a fool I am!
choice_data_list: You should go home and rest.
You can still make it, though!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Guehehehe... Yeees, you are so right. It's
not like I'll be able to find any sustenance at the
academy anyway...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wait a second! You! Got any top-tier insider
stories about the Uma you're partnered with?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I worked so hard to drag myself out here! The
least you could do is bless me with some good
stuff! Nourish my poor, shriveled-up heart!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know if it's "top-tier" or anything, but I tell
her a story about what happened to
<chrname> during training.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Ohoho... Thank you for the food... I'm calling it quits today, but I'll come back tomorrow to worship my lovely Umas!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
choice_data_list:
You should be fine as long as you complete the
late-arrival procedure.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
ASDFSLKSF?! Are you some kind of god?! What
are we waiting for?! Let's go now! To the paradise
of my dreeeaaams!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can calm down Agnes Digital
when she's like this, so I help complete her
late-arrival paperwork and take her to the venue.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Can you blame me?! Even if the members and
venue are the same, no two shows are exactly
alike! Besides...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The feelings that your oshi gives you are on a
completely different level! It's why otaku literally
go to every performance they can!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, my journey continues! I must seek out
the best spot I can in order to worship my favorite
Uma with my whole heart!
